parameters.query:
INSERT INTO memories (source, category, title, content, tags, metadata_json, embedding)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.source.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.category.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  ARRAY[]::text[],
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.metadata_json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '[{{ $json.embeddings[0].join(",") }}]'::vector
);
